data.title: Virtus Introduces Virtus Duff & Phelps Real Estate Income ETF
data.description: In a recent announcement, Virtus Investment Partners, Inc. (NYSE: VRTS) unveiled the Virtus Duff & Phelps Real Estate Income ETF (NYSE Arca: DPRE), managed by Duff & Phelps Investment Management Co. This move marks an expansion of their actively managed exchange-traded funds range. The newly introduced fund is the 25th ETF available through Virtus' multi-manager ETF platform, Virtus ETF Solutions. The Virtus Duff & Phelps Real Estate Income ETF's objective is to provide investors with a unique offering in the market.

data.title: Flowco Holdings Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 6, 2026
data.description: Houston-based Flowco Holdings Inc. (NYSE: FLOC), a key player in providing production optimization, artificial lift, and emissions management solutions for the oil and natural gas sector, is set to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial outcomes on May 6, 2026, before the market opens. Subsequently, a conference call will be held on the same day at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The live call can be accessed over the phone.

data.title: Ashland schedules Q2 2026 earnings release and conference call webcast.
data.description: A new report reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to a record low of 3.5%. This marks the lowest rate in 50 years, with job growth continuing to rise. The economy also added over 200,000 jobs last month, exceeding expectations. Additionally, wages have seen an increase of 3.1% compared to last year. This positive trend is seen as a reflection of the strong economy and job market in the country.

data.title: Allegiant and Sun Country Achieve Key Regulatory Milestone with DOT Approval
data.description: Allegiant Travel Company (NASDAQ: ALGT) and Sun Country Airlines Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: SNCY) have received an exemption from the U.S. Department of Transportation that permits both airlines to maintain operations under common ownership. The exemption was granted on April 15, 2026. This decision enables the two airlines to continue their services without disruption due to their shared ownership structure.

data.title: PMET Launches Relationship with Koch Technology Solutions to Advance Value-Added Caesium Chemicals from Shaakichiuwaanaan
data.description: On April 15, 2026, in Montreal, it was announced that on April 16, 2026, in Sydney, Australia, Koch Technology Solutions, a division of Koch Inc., will be assessing innovative processing methods for PMET's valuable caesium deposit on a global scale. The initiative includes the initiation of a crucial caesium testing program in collaboration with Koch Technology.

data.title: Aetherflux Appoints Brad Koenig to Advisory Board
data.description: Located in San Carlos, California, Aetherflux, an orbital energy infrastructure company founded by Baiju Bhatt, has revealed the addition of Brad Koenig to its Advisory Board. The appointment of Koenig comes at a crucial time as Aetherflux gears up for the launch of its initial orbital data center project in the first quarter of 2027. In his new capacity, Koenig will offer strategic insights on commercial strategy and roadmap, playing a key role in expediting the journey to market for advanced computing solutions.

data.title: Allegion Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE), a prominent global security products and solutions provider, has revealed that its board of directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.55 per ordinary share of the company. Shareholders of record as of June 15, 2026, will receive the dividend on June 30, 2026. Allegion specializes in creating advanced security and access solutions to ensure safety in various environments where individuals reside, study, work, and interact.

data.title: Wrtn Technologies Unveils its AI Interactive Storytelling Platform ‘OOC: The Playable Anime’ in North America
data.description: A consumer AI company called Wrtn Technologies has recently revealed the launch of OOC in North America. OOC is an AI character chat and interactive storytelling platform that aims to revolutionize the way users engage with content. This launch signifies Wrtn Technologies' commitment to providing innovative solutions in the field of AI, catering to the North American market. This platform offers a unique experience by combining chat functionality with interactive storytelling elements. It is set to offer users a new way to interact with AI technology, marking a significant advancement in the industry. This North American launch demonstrates the company's focus on expanding its reach and offering cutting-edge products to a wider audience.

data.title: Ticketmaster, Live Nation Has Illegal Monopoly Over Concert Venues, Jury Finds
data.description: In a significant development, a federal jury in Manhattan has ruled against Live Nation Entertainment Inc. (NYSE: LYV) and its subsidiary Ticketmaster, finding that they held a harmful monopoly over major concert venues in the U.S. This verdict could potentially lead to the companies facing financial repercussions amounting to hundreds of millions of dollars. The jury determined that Ticketmaster had been overcharging consumers by $1.72 per ticket across 22 states. As a result, there is a possibility of additional penalties and court-mandated divestitures, including amphitheaters. The judge has instructed both parties to propose a schedule for the remedies phase by the end of next week. The lawsuit also detailed how Live Nation allegedly utilized its extensive network of venue ownership, booking operations, and ticketing dominance to stifle competition.

data.title: Blue Moon Announces Initial Deep Drilling Step-Out Results from Nussir, Supplemented with Increased Resource Confidence from Infill Drilling
data.description: In Toronto on April 15, 2026, Blue Moon Metals Inc. shared positive updates on their Q1-2026 drilling efforts at the Nussir Copper-Gold-Silver Project in Norway. The company, identified as Blue Moon and trading under TSXV: MOON and NASDAQ: BMM, reported notable advancements from the program. These developments stem from the deep drilling activities conducted during the period.
Iran’s Foreign Minister Araghchi to Chinese counterpart warns of the serious repercussions of US provocative positions and actions in the Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz.

data.title: Hanwha AI Center’s HACathon | Building AI for Finance Awards First Place to Parity
data.description: Hanwha AI Center in San Francisco recently held the HACathon | Building AI for Finance event, where Parity, an AI claims companion, secured first place. The innovative AI tool aims to increase transparency during the interaction between an injured claimant and an insurance adjuster. The hackathon, co-hosted by Hanwha AI Center and AI Valley on April 3, saw participants tasked with developing functional AI products for financial processes. The competition showcased cutting-edge solutions for industry challenges.

data.title: FLORIDA CRYSTALS COMMENDS STATE OF FLORIDA, ARMY CORPS FOR PUSHING EAA RESERVOIR TOWARD COMPLETION
data.description: Florida Crystals Corporation has been an integral part of a successful public-private partnership for over 30 years, contributing to the restoration of America's Everglades and supporting the acceleration of the EAA Reservoir project. The corporation is based in West Palm Beach, Florida.
Giga Metals reveals non-brokered private placement offering, details undisclosed.

data.title: Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. Confirms Monthly Dividend for May 15, 2026
data.description: Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. (TSX: PEY) in Calgary, Alberta, announced that a monthly dividend of $0.11 per common share for April 2026 will be paid on May 15, 2026. Shareholders as of April 30, 2026, will be eligible for this dividend distribution.

data.title: April 2026 distribution revealed by CAPREIT.
data.description: The recent data reveals a concerning increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the country. Over the past week, a total of 15,000 new cases have been reported, signaling a significant spike in infections. Hospitalizations have also risen by 25%, with 500 new admissions in the last three days alone. Health experts are warning the public to adhere to safety measures and guidelines to curb the spread of the virus. The surge in cases is attributed to the highly contagious Delta variant, which has become the dominant strain in the country.Officials are urging vaccination as a crucial tool in combating the virus and protecting public health.

data.title: LGI Homes Expands into Sherman, Texas, with Grand Opening of Sherman Heights
data.description: LGI Homes is excited to introduce Sherman Heights in Sherman, Texas, a new community showcasing beautiful single-family homes. The grand opening of this development marks an exciting new chapter for the area, offering prospective buyers the opportunity to explore modern construction and design. With a variety of floor plans available, Sherman Heights promises to cater to different needs and preferences. This venture signifies a significant investment in the community, with an estimated number of homes set to be built within the development.

data.description: A recent national survey conducted on April 15, 2026, uncovered a noteworthy and consistent viewpoint among American voters. The survey indicates a robust bipartisan agreement to curb the power of health insurance firms by dismantling current monopolies and eradicating prevalent inefficiencies, fraud, and...

data.title: AI agents reach $2.9B in annual recurring revenue, facing trust gap in autonomous systems; infrastructure needed for high-stakes decisions.
data.description: Artificial intelligence agents like Cursor and Harvey are currently generating billions of dollars in revenue. However, the key challenge for making crucial autonomous decisions lies in the lack of a reliable compute infrastructure. This missing component is vital for ensuring the dependability and accuracy of AI-generated outcomes in high-stakes scenarios.
